summary: All 5 requested features tested and verified. Search autocomplete returns only celebrities (no plants/objects), Hot Celebs banner displays major names, Today's News shows major news (not gossip), Team customization endpoint works, League share buttons (WhatsApp, X, Facebook) present.
passed_tests: Search autocomplete: 'rihanna' returns Rihanna the singer with image and correct tier
Search autocomplete: 'beyonce' returns Beyoncé the singer with image and correct tier
Search autocomplete: 'kanye' returns Kanye West the rapper with image and correct tier
Search autocomplete: 'holly' returns ONLY celebrities (Buddy Holly, Holly Harris, Holly Valance, Lauren Holly) - NO plants/genus
Search autocomplete: Short queries (<2 chars) return empty as expected
Hot Celebs Banner: Displays with 🔥 icon and 'Hot Celebs This Week' title
Hot Celebs Banner: Contains Prince Andrew, Meghan Markle, Kanye West, Taylor Swift, Elon Musk, Donald Trump, Katie Price, Holly Willoughby
Hot Celebs Banner: Each celeb has name, tier, category, hot_reason, price, image
Today's News: Displays with newspaper icon and 'Today's Top Celeb News' title
Today's News: Shows major news (deaths, divorces, awards, legal) from BBC News, TMZ, Page Six
Today's News: Does NOT contain gossip keywords (braless, bikini, swimsuit, etc.)
Team Customization: /api/team/customization-options returns 200
Team Customization: Returns 8 colors (pink, cyan, gold, purple, red, green, orange, white)
Team Customization: Returns 12 icons (star, crown, fire, lightning, rocket, diamond, skull, ghost, alien, robot, unicorn, dragon)
League Detail Modal: Opens when clicking on league card
League Detail Modal: Shows invite code prominently
League Detail Modal: Has COPY button
League Detail Modal: Has WHATSAPP share button (green)
League Detail Modal: Has X (Twitter) share button
League Detail Modal: Has FB (Facebook) share button (blue)
League creation and leaderboard endpoints work correctly
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_LeagueTestTeam, TEST_LeagueCreatorTeam, TEST_LeaderboardTeam, TEST_ShareButtonsLeague for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features from the review request have been verified: (1) Search autocomplete returns only celebrities - fixed by requiring query to appear in celebrity's name, unicodedata normalization, and 'is a bar' substring fix. (2) Hot Celebs banner displays major newsworthy celebrities. (3) Today's News shows major news filtered by keywords, skipping gossip. (4) Team customization endpoint returns colors and icons. (5) League detail modal has WhatsApp, X, and Facebook share buttons.

search_autocomplete_fix.fix_details: Query must appear in celebrity's name, unicodedata normalization for accented names, fixed 'is a bar' substring match issue
